summary: The pilot expansion to the full enterprise tier is moving forward with positive feedback from the client. However, critical EU data residency and accountability requirements established as non-negotiable gating items during the kickoff call have not been captured in the follow-up proposal, launch plan, or product scope documentation.
droppedRequirements: EU data residency for all customer and employee PII-bearing workloads, storage, and processing
A named owner accountable for EU data residency compliance in the rollout plan and contract
